summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P2: Mercenary Marketplace feature. All 17 backend API tests passed (2 skipped due to no applicants). Frontend UI verified working correctly with all requested features.
passed_tests: GET /api/mercenary - lists open mercenary posts (unauthenticated access works)
GET /api/mercenary?sport=football - filter by sport works
GET /api/mercenary/my-posts - requires auth, returns user's own posts
POST /api/mercenary - requires auth, creates post linked to booking_id
POST /api/mercenary - validates booking exists and belongs to user (404 on invalid)
POST /api/mercenary - creates post with all fields correctly populated
POST /api/mercenary/{id}/apply - requires auth
POST /api/mercenary/{id}/apply - prevents applying to own post (400 error)
POST /api/mercenary/{id}/apply - successful application creates applicant entry
POST /api/mercenary/{id}/apply - prevents duplicate applications (400 error)
POST /api/mercenary/{id}/accept/{applicantId} - only host can accept (403 for non-host)
POST /api/mercenary/{id}/reject/{applicantId} - host can reject applicants
POST /api/mercenary/{id}/pay - requires acceptance first (403 if not accepted)
POST /api/mercenary/{id}/pay - returns mock or razorpay payment info
Notifications - application notification sent to host
Notifications - acceptance notification sent to player
Full flow test - Apply → Accept → Pay flow works end-to-end
Frontend: Mercenary tab displays posts with position, venue, fee, spots
Frontend: Apply button works for non-host players
Frontend: Host sees ACCEPTED section with Paid/Awaiting Payment badges
Frontend: 'Applied — Waiting' badge shown after applying
Frontend: Create dialog has Match/Mercenary toggle
Frontend: Mercenary mode shows booking selector, position, fee, spots inputs
critical_code_review_comments: Mercenary post creation correctly validates booking ownership before creating
Payment flow correctly uses mock fallback when Razorpay not configured
After mock payment, player is added to booking's players list automatically
Spots_filled is incremented and status changes to 'filled' when all spots taken
Proper data-testid attributes on all interactive elements for testing

coach.role: Host of badminton/doubles post, paid for football posts

seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_Midfielder mercenary post via API. Coach Sarah accepted and paid for Goalkeeper and TEST_Midfielder posts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 Mercenary Marketplace fully implemented and tested. Three mercenary posts exist: 1) TEST_Midfielder at PowerPlay Arena (2 spots, 1 filled by Coach Sarah), 2) Goalkeeper at PowerPlay Arena (2 spots, 1 filled by Coach Sarah), 3) Doubles Partner at SmashPoint Courts (1 spot, open - Player Arjun has applied). Payment uses Razorpay MOCK fallback. Only 'player' role has access to /matchmaking route - coach and owner roles have different dashboards. Key endpoints: /api/mercenary (list), /api/mercenary/my-posts, /api/mercenary (create), /api/mercenary/{id}/apply, /api/mercenary/{id}/accept/{applicantId}, /api/mercenary/{id}/reject/{applicantId}, /api/mercenary/{id}/pay, /api/mercenary/{id}/verify-payment.

mocked_apis.Razorpay payment processing: MOCKED - payment gateway falls back to mock mode when no gateway keys configured

feature_verification.mercenary_list: VERIFIED - Returns open posts with all required fields
feature_verification.mercenary_create_linked_to_booking: VERIFIED - Creates post linked to user's booking, inherits venue info
feature_verification.mercenary_apply: VERIFIED - Prevents self-apply, duplicate apply, creates notification
feature_verification.mercenary_accept: VERIFIED - Only host can accept, moves applicant to accepted list
feature_verification.mercenary_reject: VERIFIED - Only host can reject, removes applicant from list
feature_verification.mercenary_pay_mock: VERIFIED - Auto-processes payment, adds to paid_players, increments spots_filled
feature_verification.mercenary_notifications: VERIFIED - Application notification to host, acceptance notification to player
feature_verification.frontend_mercenary_tab: VERIFIED - Shows posts with position, venue, fee, spots
feature_verification.frontend_host_view: VERIFIED - Shows ACCEPTED section with Paid/Awaiting badges
feature_verification.frontend_create_mercenary_dialog: VERIFIED - Has booking selector, position, fee, spots inputs
